blended.narrative: Nakiska is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,139 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
